item.title: BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In the heat of the summer, there’s nothing like a cold beer! Even better, there’s nothing like a cold American craft beer!! This week on Beer America TV we’re talking about BridgePort Brewing’s Summer Squeeze . Brewed with Lemon grass and Yuzu, this “Bright Ale” is clean, crisp and leaves you with a bit of […]

The post BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Harpoon Brewery: Summer Ale – Ep. 150
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
OK, we at Beer America TV know that Summer is officially over, but you can still find many summer brews on the store shelves and if not, then put this one in your cue for next year. We’re talking Harpoon Summer Ale from Harpoon Brewery in Boston MA. This is a Kölsch-style ale that is […]

The post Harpoon Brewery: Summer Ale – Ep. 150 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Breckenridge SummerBright Ale, Ep. 147
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As summer comes to a close, now is the best time to sample what’s left of the summer brews on your beer store’s shelf. This week, Beer America TV talks about SummerBright Ale from the Breckenridge Brewery in Denver, Colorado . Crisp and clean with a low abv puts this summer ale on the list […]

The post Breckenridge SummerBright Ale, Ep. 147 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Lazy Magnolia Indian Summer, Ep. 108
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In the summer it’s hot and drinking a heavy porter might not be the beer of choice. Recently it seems many breweries are coming out with summer beers that are crisp, light and refreshing – more importantly they are American Craft brewed. This week we try Lazy Magnolia Indian Summer Spiced Ale . This American […]

The post Lazy Magnolia Indian Summer, Ep. 108 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bell’s Brewery – Oberon, Ep. 73
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As the summer starts to wind down, we wanted to share an American Craft beer for a warm sunny day, Oberon. Oberon is an American wheat ale brewed with Saaz hops. It’s spicy and fruity, but extremely well balanced. If you’ve not had beer from Bell’s Brewery, we suggest you give them a try . […]

The post Bell’s Brewery – Oberon, Ep. 73 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
